summary: TVS Holdings has declared an interim dividend of Rs 86 per equity share, amounting to a 1,720% payout on its 2.02 crore shares. The record date for this dividend is April 2, with payments expected within 30 days. The company also raised Rs 650 crore through non-convertible debentures.

title: Cheers to IPL exit! Brokerages say Rs 16,660-crore RCB stake sale will unlock value for United Spirits
summary: United Spirits’ Rs 16,660 crore sale of its RCB stake has been termed value accretive by brokerages, which expect improved capital allocation and potential shareholder returns. The deal, involving major investors, sets a strong valuation benchmark for IPL franchises and could act as a positive trigger for the stock.

title: L&T shares jump 4%, up nearly 10% in two days. What’s triggering this uptick?
summary: Larsen and Toubro shares rose after its WET arm secured a Rs 1,000–2,500 crore water project in Guwahati, boosting its northeast presence. Despite a 15% fall amid Middle East tensions, operations remain largely unaffected with 95% projects running. West Asia continues to be key, contributing nearly 40% to the order book and 75% to international business.

title: Nifty can fall below 19,000 in worst case GFC-like scenario, warns Bernstein; rupee could breach 110/USD
summary: Global brokerage Bernstein warns the Iran conflict could trigger a "GFC moment" for India if prolonged, leading to elevated crude prices and tight financing. This scenario risks exposing macro vulnerabilities, potentially pushing the rupee past 110 per dollar and significantly impacting Nifty's valuation and India's growth trajectory.

title: Zerodha co-founder Nithin Kamath's warning to investors: This is not the market to take big bets
summary: Zerodha co-founder Nithin Kamath advises traders to prioritize survival over profit in the current volatile market. With upcoming holidays and unpredictable news cycles, he suggests reducing trade sizes and taking breaks to mitigate risks and avoid emotional strain.

title: TVS Group company declares an interim dividend of  ₹86 per share. Record date, other details here
summary: TVS Holdings has declared an interim dividend for the financial year ending on March 31, 2026. Check dividend rate, record date and other details.

title: Waaree Energies shares gain over 3.5% as board approves  ₹3,900 crore capex for glass manufacturing unit
summary: Waaree Energies shares rose 3.6% to  ₹3,197 after approving a  ₹3,900 crore capital expenditure for a glass manufacturing plant. The company also increased its stake in Waaree Transpower from 64.04% to 75.10%.&nbsp;

title: Why SBI Life is winning the valuation game vs HDFC, ICICI Prudential
summary: SBI Life has outperformed peers on growth and valuation, but its heavy reliance on ULIPs could test momentum if markets remain weak in FY27.

title: CMPDI IPO allotment date likely today. GMP, steps to check share allotment status online
summary: CMPDI IPO allotment date is likely today, 25 March 2026, Wednesday. Investors can check CMPDI IPO allotment status online through the websites of BSE, NSE and the IPO registrar. Kfin Technologies is the CMPDI IPO registrar.

title: India VIX today near 25. Here's what it signals for the Indian stock market
summary: India VIX has dropped to 24.5 from a high of 27.17, signaling reduced market anxiety. Nifty 50 and BSE Sensex experienced gains of over 2%. Decreasing crude oil prices may ease inflation pressures, though geopolitical uncertainties continue to drive volatility.

title: Starting retirement planning at 40? Here are 5 steps to build healthy corpus
summary: Retirement planning at 40 can still help build a strong corpus. Disciplined investing, diversification, insurance and clear financial goals are key. Read here about these measures that ensure stability, protect against inflation, and support long‑term financial independence.

title: UBS downgrades Indian stocks to Neutral as Iran war raises energy supply risks
summary: Global brokerage UBS has downgraded Indian equities to Neutral from Attractive due to escalating geopolitical risks in the Middle East and their impact on India's energy imports. Analysts highlight the nation's vulnerability to oil price spikes and supply disruptions, particularly through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Top Gainers & Losers on March 25: PCBL Chemical, Reliance Power, Kaynes Tech, Indian Bank among top gainers
summary: US-Iran peace deal optimism boosts domestic equities on March 25, with Nifty 50 rising 1.72% and Sensex up 1.63%. The Nifty Consumer Durables index led gains at 3.51%, while PCB Chemical surged 13.7%. Real estate and PSU banks also saw significant gains.

title: Vivid Electromech IPO Day 1: Issue booked 38% so far; check GMP, issue details
summary: The Vivid Electromech IPO runs from March 25 to March 30, with a price band of  ₹528 to  ₹555. The company specializes in LV and MV electrical panels and reported a net profit of  ₹9.44 crore as of September 30, 2025.

title: Kotak Mahindra Bank responds over alleged fraud: Initiated ‘detailed reconciliation’ of FDs to Panchkula Municipal Corp
summary: Kotak Mahindra Bank today said it has initiated reconciliation of fixed deposits and linked bank accounts maintained by the Municipal Corporation of Panchkula, following instructions from the civic body.

title: Alert for tenants: March is your last window to deduct TDS on rent
summary: The tax department has started looking closely into TDS defaulters on rent. Last year, the department sent notices to taxpayers who claimed HRA on the rent they paid but did not deduct TDS

title: Prime Focus among 6 stocks that hit 52-week high; rally up to 20% in a month
summary: The Indian stock market saw a significant rally on Wednesday. The Sensex jumped 1,205 points, closing at 75,273. Amidst this broader market strength, six stocks from the BSE 1000 index reached their highest levels in a year. These new 52-week highs signal positive momentum for these companies. Prime Focus, Acutaas Chemicals, and Aurobindo Pharma were among those reaching new peaks.

title: Itching for profits? Make survival the only goal for now as markets head into holiday phase: Zerodha’s Nithin Kamath
summary: In volatile markets, Zerodha CEO Nithin Kamath advises traders to prioritize survival over profit. He suggests trading with smaller capital and waiting for genuine opportunities, especially with global markets influenced by unpredictable events. With upcoming holidays and geopolitical tensions, a break to recharge is recommended for a fresh perspective.

title: HDFC Bank, L&T to Eternal: These large-cap stocks powered 3.5% two-day rally in Nifty 50
summary: The Nifty 50 rose 1.72% today, taking the two-day rally to 3.5%. The rally was broad-based, as barring Coal India (down 2%) and Power Grid (up just 0.05%), all index constituents participated in the stock market rebound.

title: Gold price in India jumps  ₹15,000 in two days. Will the rally continue?
summary: MCX gold rate today climbed to an intraday high of  ₹1,44,570, as easing inflation fear fuels US Fed rate cut buzz

title: Understand private credit: It may be a word you will soon hear more often in the stock markets
summary: It is called “shadow banking” for a reason. Private credit serves a purpose as it caters to borrowers who fall between bank underwriting standards and public market requirements. But it also carries structural weaknesses such as poor borrower quality, limited transparency, and subjective valuations. Despite all this, private credit is only growing. Is it a miracle market or a disguised catastrophe? The answer will be revealed only in times of stress.

title: Gainers & Losers: RPSG Ventures and L&T among 7 top movers on Wednesday. Here’s why
summary: Market action was dominated by sharp moves in RPSG Ventures, Larsen & Toubro, and Fino Payments Bank as benchmark indices extended their winning streak.

title: Govt appoints KV Ramana Murty as Sebi whole-time member
summary: The government has appointed Kompella Venkata Ramana Murty as a whole-time member of Sebi for a period of three years.

title: US stock market today: Dow Jones, S&P 500 futures rise on hopes of de-escalation in US-Iran conflict
summary: US futures traded higher on March 25 due to optimism surrounding negotiations with Iran, despite recent troop deployments. President Trump announced a 15-point plan for peace, contributing to a decline in oil prices as tensions appeared to ease, although volatility remains.

title: DA hike: Could Union Cabinet announce increase today? Here's how much salary jump to expect
summary: High expectations surround a Cabinet announcement on Dearness Allowance hike this month. It is anticipated to provide financial relief amid rising costs, benefiting over 1.2 crore employees and pensioners.

title: No-buy days and cart pauses: How Gen Z is reshaping money habits
summary: From no-buy periods to 24-hour cart pauses, social media is reshaping how young Indians save and spend—simplifying money habits, but also raising risks of oversimplified advice.
